problem id: 5fab4df0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  01011100 -> 01110010
  00110100 -> 11010001
  00001001 -> 00100100
  10001000 -> 00100100
  10110100 -> 11010101
  01110001 -> 11000111
  11011101 -> 01110010
  00001110 -> 00111000
  00100000 -> 10000001
  11011001 -> 01100010

query: 10001100
predicted answer: 00110100
